LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTY. PERKISS REPORTED THAT A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WAS FILED IN THIS CASE YESTERDAY. SINCE THE DISMISSAL WAS FILED SUBSEQUENT TO THE TENTATIVE RULING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT MJS MUSIC & ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S MOTION 1) TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, 2) TO DISMISS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE STAY ACTION. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN WITH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT ITS CLAIM ARISES OUT OF ANY PURPOSEFUL CONTACT DEFENDANT HAD WITH CALIFORNIA NOR THAT THIS DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO GENERAL JURISDICTION IN CALIFORNIA. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT PERKISS OF COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT O. WHYTE AND ATTY. CHRISTINA A. DONDERO OF NIESAR & WHITE LLP, TEL. NO. 882-5300 APPEARING FOR THE MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; ATTY. PERKISS REPORTED THAT A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WAS FILED IN THIS CASE YESTERDAY. SINCE THE DISMISSAL WAS FILED SUBSEQUENT TO THE TENTATIVE RULING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT M J S MUSIC & ENTERTAINMENT L L C'S Motion 1) To Quash Service Of Summons Or In The Alternative, 2) To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Action - MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN WITH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT IT'S CLAIM ARISES OUT OF ANY PURPOSEFUL CONTACT DEFENDANT HAD WITH CALIFORNIA NOR THAT THIS DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO GENERAL JURISDICTION IN CALIFORNIA. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/LB
